entity.label: Hezron
entity.subtitle: Landmark
entity.description: A plain in the south of Judah, west of Kadesh-barnea (Josh. 15:3).

nodes.label: Hezron
nodes.description: A plain in the south of Judah, west of Kadesh-barnea (Josh. 15:3).

verses.text: And it went out to the south side to Maalehacrabbim, and passed along to Zin, and ascended up on the south side unto Kadeshbarnea, and passed along to Hezron, and went up to Adar, and fetched a compass to Karkaa:
